gist.headline: The hive mind in your terminal
gist.blurb: We've packed the entire Pollinations ecosystem into a tiny 47KB CLI. Generate images, chat with models, and manage your keys right from your terminal—whether you're a human or an AI agent.
gist.summary: Introduced the official Pollinations CLI (@pollinations_ai/cli), providing terminal access to image, text, audio, and video generation for both developers and AI agents.
gist.impact: Developers can now interact with all Pollinations APIs directly from the command line, featuring colored tables for humans and JSON output for agentic workflows.
gist.visual_concept: A retro computer terminal glowing with lime green text. The Pollinations bee (Polli) wearing a tiny hacker beanie, typing on a chunky mechanical keyboard. The Nomnom creature eating a printed JSON receipt.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny hacker beanie, typing on a chunky mechanical keyboard connected to a retro computer terminal. The CRT monitor glows with lime green (#ecf874) code. A round tan mochi-ball creature happily eats a printed JSON receipt nearby. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
